scripts.check:links: cross-env SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4321 npm run build && concurrently -k -s first "npm run preview" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:4321 && linkinator http://127.0.0.1:4321 --recurse --silent --skip mailto:.* --skip tel:.*"
scripts.test:lighthouse: cross-env SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4321 npm run build && concurrently -k -s first "npm run preview" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:4321 && tsx scripts/check-lighthouse.ts"
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run check:schemas && npm run check:i18n && npm run build && npm run test && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:a11y && npm run check:links && npm run test:lighthouse
